creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to sync doc/ru/FAQ/applications.sgml with English 1.14.
It's a last commit of series in syncing with English FAQ _before_
switching to DocBook format. After committing this patch we can
switch to DocBook.
